quote.text: In every walk with nature, one receives far more than he seeks.
quote.author: John Muir

fun_fact.text: Hungarian paprika isn't just one spice — there are eight official grades ranging from delicate and mild to strong and spicy! The town of Szeged and Kalocsa are Hungary's paprika capitals, where the red peppers are still traditionally dried in long braided strings called füzér.

short_read.title: The Secret Lives of Hummingbirds in the Pacific Northwest
short_read.teaser: These tiny jewels migrate thousands of miles to visit gardens like yours each spring. Learn why they're even more remarkable than you might think.

medium_read.title: The Return of the Elwha: Largest Dam Removal in U.S. History
medium_read.teaser: Right in your backyard, the Elwha River experienced an incredible transformation when two dams were removed. The salmon, sediment, and ecosystem are returning in ways that surprised even scientists.

long_read.title: Ellis Island: Gateway to the American Dream
long_read.teaser: Between 1892 and 1954, over 12 million immigrants passed through Ellis Island, each carrying hopes and dreams. Their stories of courage and resilience shaped the America we know today.

port_angeles.title: Black-tailed Deer Season at Hurricane Ridge
port_angeles.description: Late spring and early summer is a wonderful time to spot black-tailed deer and their fawns at Hurricane Ridge. The does often bring their spotted babies to graze in the alpine meadows as wildflowers begin to bloom. Early morning or late afternoon visits offer the best wildlife viewing opportunities.

puzzle_1.question: A hummingbird's heart beats approximately ___ times per minute while in flight.
puzzle_1.correct_response: That's right, Barbara! Their tiny hearts are incredibly fast — faster than you can even imagine!
puzzle_1.close_response: You're very close! It's actually about 1,200 beats per minute — absolutely remarkable for such a tiny bird!
puzzle_1.wrong_response: Those amazing little birds have hearts that beat about 1,200 times per minute — that's 20 times per second!
puzzle_1.learn_more_text: To power their incredible hovering flight and high metabolism, hummingbirds have the fastest heart rate of all birds. When resting, their heart rate drops to a comparatively leisurely 250 beats per minute.

puzzle_2.question: Which Hungarian word means 'thank you'?
puzzle_2.correct_response: Köszönöm, Barbara! You got it right — what a lovely word to know!
puzzle_2.wrong_response: The word is 'köszönöm' (or the shorter 'köszi' among friends). 'Szia' means hello/bye, 'igen' means yes, and 'viszlát' means goodbye!
puzzle_2.learn_more_text: Hungarian is part of the Finno-Ugric language family, making it quite different from most European languages. It's known for its beautiful, melodic sound and its complex but logical grammar system.

puzzle_3.question: What type of tree is the official state tree of Washington?
puzzle_3.correct_response: Wonderful! The Western Hemlock is our state tree — you see these graceful evergreens all around the Olympic Peninsula!
puzzle_3.wrong_response: It's actually the Western Hemlock! These beautiful evergreens with their drooping tops are found throughout Washington's forests, including right here around Port Angeles.
puzzle_3.learn_more_text: The Western Hemlock became Washington's state tree in 1947. These graceful trees can live 400-500 years and grow up to 200 feet tall, thriving in the moist climate of the Pacific Northwest.

game.title: Bubble Shooter
game.description: A relaxing bubble puzzle game — aim and pop matching colored bubbles. Easy to pick up, fun to play!
